Qt Development logo trademark notice

Source: https://www.qt.io/brand/development/logo
Trademark guidance: https://www.qt.io/trademark/

SugarSubstitute vendors the unmodified Qt Development logo mark only for factual
identification of the PySide6 dependency and link target in the About page.

Qt is a registered trademark of The Qt Company Ltd. and its subsidiaries.
All other trademarks are the property of their respective owners.
